ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the sample location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the sample location */,
  "ele" REAL /* Elevation at the sample location */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sampling site */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling method used */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habitat type */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_habitat_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_id") REFERENCES habitat_types ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES sampling_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species (e.g., endangered, stable) */,
  "lifecycle" TEXT /* Lifecycle stage of the species (e.g., juvenile, adult) */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "habitat_preference" TEXT /* Preferred habitat of the species */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the species information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_species" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being linked */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species found in the sample */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of this species in the sample */,
  "size" REAL /* Average size of the species in the sample */,
  "weight" REAL /* Average weight of the species in the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id", "species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary habitat type */,
  "water_type" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., freshwater, brackish) */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey at the site */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample related to the quality metric */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Type of quality metric (e.g., turbidity, pH) */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value for the quality metric */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used to measure the quality metric */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the quality metric (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES sampling_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_samples" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the sample */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "ele" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the environmental condition record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample linked to conditions */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of sampling */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity at the time of sampling */,
  "oxygen_level" REAL /* Oxygen level at the time of sampling */,
  "turbidity" REAL /* Turbidity level at the time of sampling */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for status record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being assessed */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date when the status was assessed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current conservation status (e.g., endangered, vulnerable) */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assessed the conservation status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_status_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_status_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES assessors ("assessor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitat_types" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the habitat type */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat type (e.g., river, lake) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "water_type" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., freshwater, brackish) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sampling method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sampling method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessors" (
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assessor */,
  "assessor_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessor */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the assessor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the assessor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessor_id")
)
